lede: A look at December 19 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including King Princess and Ingrid Burley, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Andrei Karlov
events.desc: Russian ambassador to Turkey Andrei Karlov is assassinated while at an art exhibition in Ankara. The assassin, Mevlüt Mert Altıntaş, is shot and killed by a Turkish guard.

events.title: 2016 Berlin truck attack
events.desc: A vehicular attack in Berlin, Germany, kills 12 and injures 56 people at a Christmas market.

events.title: SilkAir Flight 185
events.desc: SilkAir Flight 185 crashes into the Musi River, near Palembang in Indonesia, killing 104.

events.title: Aeroflot Flight 101/435
events.desc: Aeroflot Flight 101/435 is hijacked to China by its first officer.

events.title: Sino-British Joint Declaration
events.desc: The Sino-British Joint Declaration, stating that China would resume the exercise of sovereignty over Hong Kong and the United Kingdom would restore Hong Kong to China with effect from July 1, 1997, is signed in Beijing by Deng Xiaoping and Margaret Thatcher.

events.title: Apollo program
events.desc: Apollo program: The last crewed lunar flight, Apollo 17, carrying Eugene Cernan, Ronald Evans, and Harrison Schmitt, returns to Earth.

events.title: John Bodkin Adams
events.desc: Irish-born physician John Bodkin Adams is arrested in connection with the suspicious deaths of more than 160 patients. Eventually he is convicted only of minor charges.

events.title: Darr Mine disaster
events.desc: Two hundred thirty-nine coal miners die in the Darr Mine Disaster in Jacobs Creek, Pennsylvania.

events.title: Thomas Paine
events.desc: Thomas Paine publishes one of a series of pamphlets in The Pennsylvania Journal entitled "The American Crisis".

events.title: Henry II of England
events.desc: Henry II of England is crowned at Westminster Abbey.

deaths.text: Andrei Karlov, Russian diplomat, Ambassador to Turkey
Amnon Lipkin-Shahak, Israeli general and politician, 22nd Transportation Minister of Israel
